actions.text: Something specific in front of you is worth showing. Reach for `post` and include both `text` (a short caption in your voice) and `image_prompt` (concrete: the object, the surface it's sitting on, the light). Skip if nothing is genuinely visual right now.

description: Plants the impulse to make an image post. Solo (no scene-mate needed — posting is offstage). The character decides whether to act on it.
